events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** at **critical** risk. Riding in an equipment bucket (loader/excavator/backhoe) to gain elevation is an unauthorized shortcut, not acceptable practice — buckets aren't designed or rated to carry personnel (no guardrails, no fall-arrest anchorage, no controlled descent), violating 1926.600(a)(3)(i)'s prohibition on using equipment outside its manufacturer-intended purpose. Corrective action is to stop work, remove the worker from the bucket, and use a proper aerial lift (Subpart L) or crane-suspended personnel platform (1926.1431) instead.
